data.title: Global Sources Hong Kong Shows Phase II Officially Opens, AI Products Go Mainstream as Humanoid Robot Zone Makes Its Debut
data.description: Today marks the inauguration of Phase II of the Global Sources Hong Kong Shows at AsiaWorld-Expo in Hong Kong. The event, running from 18 to 21 April for four days, encompasses four key trade shows: the Mobile Electronics Show, the Smart Home, Security &...

data.title: JinkoSolar Officially Launches "Light Diamond" Lightweight, High-Strength Module
data.description: On April 18, 2026, JinkoSolar, a top global supplier of PV and ESS, introduced a new lightweight module solution tailored for low-load-bearing roofs. Known as the Jinko "Light Diamond," this high-strength module is derived from the Tiger Neo 3.0 series. This innovative product aims to provide a reliable solar energy option for structures with limited load-bearing capacity.

data.title: Poland's parliament fails to override President Nawrocki's veto on crypto bill, for the second time.
data.description: The attempt to override President Karol Nawrocki's veto of Poland's crypto regulation bill has been unsuccessful once more in the parliament.

data.title: Deep Fission to Host Community Webinar on Advanced Nuclear Project in Parsons, Kansas
data.description: Deep Fission, Inc. is set to hold a community engagement webinar in Parsons, Kansas, on Tuesday, April 21, at 7 p.m. CDT. This virtual event aims to educate the public about the company's innovative nuclear energy project in the area. The webinar will be led by Deep Fission's Chief Operating Officer, Mike Brasel, who will discuss the company's technology, project initiatives, and community involvement. Participants will also be able to ask questions during the session.

data.title: Record high corporate profits face potential decline due to 4 key factors, leaving experts uncertain about their longevity.
data.description: Many experts hold varying theories on the factors behind significant increases in growth. However, a commonly shared belief is that the potential for further growth is gradually diminishing.

data.title: MOVR targets $4.50 after 25% dip to $2.31; likely in 2 weeks if $2.20 support holds.
data.description: The price of Moonriver experienced a sharp decline to $2.31, presenting a potential opportunity for investors as it is currently above key moving averages. Technical analysis suggests a potential upward movement towards $4.50 in the next two weeks, contingent upon the $2.20 support remaining stable.

data.title: Anthropic's Mythos Triggers Cybersecurity Race — CrowdStrike, Rubrik, Cloudflare Stand To Gain
data.description: Anthropic has introduced Project Glasswing and the Claude Mythos frontier model, a groundbreaking development in cybersecurity. This unveiling showcases an AI system that can autonomously identify and exploit software vulnerabilities on a large scale. The publication of Mythos' impressive breakout scores - 93.9% on SWE-bench Verified and 83.1% on CyberGym - by ARK Invest signals a significant advancement in software engineering and cybersecurity defense. Rather than posing a threat to existing cybersecurity leaders, Project Glasswing is seen as a catalyst that will drive demand for real-time protection services provided by companies like CrowdStrike Holdings, Cloudflare Inc., and Rubrik Inc. Anthropic's strategy of keeping Mythos private and collaborating with major partners such as AWS, Apple, Microsoft, and Google indicates a strategic approach towards computing and security. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.
Gavin Newsom Rips Trump Over 'Energy Dominance' Claims Amid Spiking Fuel Prices— 'Completely Detached Failure'

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Warns Iran As Strait Of Hormuz Blockade Begins; Broadcom, Bloom, Sandisk Are Big Winners
data.description: President Trump recently issued a warning to Iran regarding the U.S. blockade on the vital Strait of Hormuz. Concurrently, Sandisk experienced a significant surge in its stock value, reaching new record highs. This event occurred as Dow Jones Futures painted a mixed picture with various companies benefitting, including Broadcom, Bloom, and Sandisk emerging as the notable winners in the market.

data.title: Europe’s Largest dedicated Google First Partner Rebrands to Beyond, Redefining a ‘New Era’ in Accelerated AI-Driven Cloud Transformations
data.description: After a year and a half of substantial growth and several acquisitions, Beyond has officially launched a complete rebranding campaign. The company has expanded its presence in the UK, Europe, and North America, solidifying its position in these markets.
Buyback details: April 9 to April 15, 2026. Significant transactions took place during this period.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Pops As Trump Says This On Iran; Cathie Wood Loads Up On Palantir Shares (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase on the stock market following remarks by President Trump regarding Iran. Oracle witnessed a significant surge in its stock, while Palantir also saw gains attributed to Cathie Wood purchasing shares. This event was covered live under the title "Stock Market Today: Dow Pops As Trump's Iran Statements Influence; Cathie Wood Acquires Palantir Shares."

data.title: Three Papers Published Consecutively in Nature Energy: JinkoSolar's Breakthroughs in TOPCon/Perovskite Tandem Technology Receive Authoritative Recognition
data.description: In a recent news release dated April 18, 2026, it was announced that JinkoSolar, a prominent supplier of photovoltaic (PV) and energy storage systems (ESS) worldwide, has unveiled three research papers consecutively in just one month in Nature Energy, a prestigious publication within the energy research domain. These papers serve as a significant milestone for the company, underscoring its dedication to innovation and advancement in the industry.

data.title: HIGH's RSI at 92 hints at a price correction to $0.30 in 7 days post a 298% surge to $0.47. Smart money prepares for fall with negative funding rates.
data.description: After a significant increase of 298% to reach $0.47, HIGH's Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 92, indicating a likely correction. Additionally, the negative funding rates suggest that experienced investors are preparing for a decline. The projected target retracement is anticipated to be within the range of $0.30 to $0.19.

data.title: ZEC at $324.98 eyes $385 breakout as short squeeze grows, with 59% retail traders short. Expect $385 in 30 days.
data.description: Currently, Zcash is being traded at a price of $324.98 and is experiencing a significant squeeze. Around 59% of retail traders have taken a short position on the cryptocurrency. Despite this, the price of Zcash remains above the crucial support level of $300. This situation indicates a potential rise to $385 within the next 30 days. The bear market seems to be overleveraged, suggesting a possible increase in price for Zcash in the near future.

data.title: Monday Trade Brings Top NASDAQ Stocks On-Chain, Launching First Tokenized Stock Trading on Monad Network, Powered by Anchored
data.description: On April 18, 2026, in Hong Kong, Monday Trade, a decentralized trading platform on Monad, introduced 24/5 trading for ten major U.S. stocks with 1:1 backing and on-chain settlement. This makes it the pioneer platform to offer such services, enabling continuous trading opportunities.

data.title: BNB price tests $650 breakout with 68% bullish positioning, 89% Bollinger Band indicates potential for increase.
data.description: BNB is currently positioned at a crucial point around $634, with large investors holding 68% bullish positions. However, there is a notable increase in selling pressure. The Bollinger Band, indicating 89% placement, forecasts a potential breakout above $650.

data.title: Alert: Possible 40% crash if ORDI breaks $4.16 support after hitting $7.50 resistance. Downside targets at $2.70.
data.description: The rejection of ORDI at the resistance level of $7.50 indicates a weakness in the stock, with momentum indicators showing a negative divergence. The critical support level stands at $4.16, which is likely to face a test soon, and if broken, could lead to further downside movement towards the $2.70 range.

data.title: DOGE price stuck at $0.10, expected to hit $0.12 or drop to $0.08 by month-end as whales accumulate.
data.description: The current price of Dogecoin is at $0.10 with significant activity from large investors who are increasing their holdings. However, there is a notable presence of sellers who are aggressively trading. The whale investors hold a 76.8% bullish position, indicating confidence in the market despite the pressure from retail sellers. This trend suggests a potential for a sharp and sudden price increase in the near future.

data.title: XRP set to surge to $1.65 in 2 weeks; institutional buying pushes price near resistance levels, signaling a breakout soon.
data.description: XRP is currently trading close to crucial resistance levels as institutional investors are showing significant bullish sentiment, with heavy long positions being taken. This trend indicates a potential breakout towards $1.65. Based on technical analysis, compression patterns are forming, pointing towards an imminent significant price movement.
